channel.title: Tokenization on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Tokenization on Archive 03

item.title: Chainlink: The Hidden Plumber of the RWA Era?
item.description: Chainlink ($LINK) aims to be the connectivity infrastructure for on-chain finance through RWA tokenization, oracles, and CCIP. We examine whether it is the essential plumbing for the tokenization era or just overpriced middleware.

item.title: RWA Tokenization: Wall Street Is Making Its Move
item.description: Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization is moving beyond the experimental stage with the participation of traditional financial giants like BlackRock and Franklin Templeton. We explore whether this is Wall Street’s next big play or just a niche experiment.
